summary: Iteration 218 - I Ching Hexagram State-Machine, CosmicSparkline, ResonancePulse Testing Complete. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI components verified: CosmicSparkline with stability indicator and HexagramBadge, ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE Logic Gate section with HexagramBadge, Codex page HexagramBadge, ResonancePulse containers on satellites.
critical_code_review_comments: hexagram.py: I Ching state-machine correctly computes 64 hexagrams from 6-bit boolean array based on user conditions
hexagram.py: Changing lines detection works - identifies conditions near threshold for state transitions
cosmic_state.py: Unified endpoint now includes hexagram object with number, chinese, name, bits, trigrams, is_transitioning, changing_lines_count, equilibrium_score
energy_gates.py: Credits fix at line 167-168 properly handles dict/int/float credits values
CosmicSparkline.js: SVG sparkline renders 5 element dots with gradient fill, stability indicator with colored dot
ResonancePulse.js: CSS animation fallback works when no Web Audio AnalyserNode available (scale/opacity cycling)
HexagramBadge.js: Compact mode shows chinese character and number, full mode shows hexagram lines and changing lines count
HexagramGlitch.js: CSS @keyframes animation with hue-rotate, brightness, translate transforms for transitioning hexagrams
MissionControl.js: Logic Gate section shows HexagramBadge with HexagramGlitch wrapper when transitioning
Codex.js: HexagramBadge in header area with HexagramGlitch wrapper when transitioning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 218 verified I Ching hexagram state-machine features: (1) GET /api/hexagram/current returns hexagram with number (1-64), chinese, pinyin, name, 6-bit array, trigrams (upper/lower), solfeggio_hz (174-963Hz). (2) Hexagram changing_lines array with direction (rising/falling) and threshold. (3) target_hexagram present when is_transitioning is true. (4) conditions object with equilibrium_score, tier, elements_explored, archives_unlocked, recipes_created, trades_completed. (5) GET /api/cosmic-state includes hexagram object with is_transitioning, changing_lines_count, equilibrium_score. (6) GET /api/energy-gates/status no longer returns 500 (credits fix). (7) CosmicSparkline on Hub shows ODE energy curve with 5 element dots, stability indicator (stable/shifting/volatile), HexagramBadge compact. (8) ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE Logic Gate section shows HexagramBadge with HexagramGlitch when transitioning. (9) Codex page header shows HexagramBadge with HexagramGlitch. (10) ResonancePulse containers on satellites with CSS animation fallback. Current hexagram for test user: #3 屯 Zhun (Difficulty at the Beginning) with 1 changing line.

energy_gates_credits_fix.details: GET /api/energy-gates/status returns 200 OK (no longer 500 error), credits field properly handled

cosmic_sparkline_widget.details: CosmicSparkline renders on Hub page top-right with SVG sparkline, 5 element dots (W,F,E,M,W), stability indicator (Volatile), HexagramBadge compact (屯 #3)

hexagram_badge_compact.details: HexagramBadge compact mode shows chinese character and number (屯 #3)

hexagram_badge_full.details: HexagramBadge full mode shows hexagram lines (╍/━), trigram info, name, and changing lines count

hexagram_glitch_animation.details: HexagramGlitch CSS animation wraps transitioning hexagram badges with flicker effect

mission_control_logic_gate.details: ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE panel shows Logic Gate section with HexagramBadge displaying current hexagram state

codex_hexagram_header.details: Codex page header shows HexagramBadge with HexagramGlitch wrapper when transitioning

resonance_pulse_satellites.details: ResonancePulse containers (10 found) render on satellites with CSS animation fallback (scale/opacity cycling)
